genre_refs: Mid-century Americana / Norman Rockwell-style illustration (artist Harold Anderson, 'Every Sunday Morning')
description: Poster built on a mid-20th-century color illustration (credited in the tweet to Harold Anderson, 'Every Sunday Morning'). The painting shows a family seated in a wooden church pew lit by warm light from stained-glass windows: a father in a blue-gray suit looking upward, a mother in a lavender coat, hat, and green scarf beside him, a young girl in a pink dress and bonnet on the father's lap, and a boy in a gray suit holding a Bible; an American flag stands at the right edge. Overlaid across the top in white serif and bold sans-serif caps is the text 'A DREAM WORTH FIGHTING FOR.'
